problem.title: You know AI can deliver value. But it's not happening.
problem.problem1text: Your competitors are moving now. Every month of delay is a month of lost advantage.
problem.problem2text: Only early adopters use it. The rest waits.
problem.problem3text: 80% of AI licenses go unused after month 1. Buying isn't adopting.

solution.title: How we make a difference
solution.item1text: No months of pilots. Week 1 we map your processes, week 4 the first automation runs in production.
solution.item2title: Not just early adopters, but your whole team
solution.item2text: We train your best people, tailored to your context, and turn enthusiasts into experts.
solution.item3title: After 6 months you manage everything yourself
solution.item3text: We build together with your team, not solo. Continuing is a choice, not a necessity.
solution.testimonial: "I have collaborated with multiple parties, but I truly see SPAIK as a partner who thinks along with us and acts proactively, my team is engaged and faster than ever."

aiDiscovery.title: Discover your AI opportunities in 15 minutes

aiDiscovery.feature2: A maturity score: where do you stand with AI now
aiDiscovery.feature3: Concrete next steps you can apply tomorrow

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does a full implementation take?
faq.a1: The Kickstart lasts 4 weeks. Fully independent teams typically take 6 months on average.
faq.q2: How do you ensure it continues to work after departure?
faq.a2: We train key figures in your team—people who take ownership. They not only learn how it works but also how to manage it and build new automations themselves.
faq.q3: What if our data or systems are not yet ready for AI?
faq.a3: That's why we start with a Tech assessment. We analyze your data and systems and prepare them for AI as we build.
faq.q4: Does this work with our current legacy systems?
faq.a4: We maintain the old system intact, but build a smart, flexible layer on top. This approach always works.
faq.a5: We always start with a proof of concept in the Kickstart. If it doesn't work, you know within 4 weeks — before you've invested heavily.
faq.a6: That's exactly what we recommend. Start with one process, prove the value, then scale.
faq.a7: Your team manages it independently. We remain available for questions, but you no longer need us for daily operations.
faq.q8: Do we need internal tech people to get started?
faq.a8: Not necessarily. We bring the technical expertise. What you need are people who know the processes and are motivated to improve them.
faq.q9: Do your training courses comply with the EU AI Act?
faq.a9: Yes. Our Fundamentals training covers AI literacy as required by the EU AI Act, including responsible use and risk classification.
faq.q10: Are you replacing people with AI?
faq.a10: No. We automate tasks, not jobs. The goal is to free up your people to do more valuable work.

cta.title: Discover if we're a match?
cta.description: I will review your situation alongside you and walk through a few relevant cases. After 30 minutes, you'll know exactly what is possible and whether we are the right fit. No sales pitch—I'll assess the situation honestly and be upfront about what does and doesn't fit.
cta.name: Jochem van Laren

detail.whatYouGet: What you get out of it

strategie.metaDescription: In half a day, go from vague ideas to a concrete AI roadmap with prioritized opportunities.
strategie.title: Strategy
strategie.pitch: In one afternoon, go from vague ideas to a concrete AI roadmap with prioritized opportunities and ROI estimates. No dry presentation, but energetic, interactive and hands-on.
strategie.yes1: You want to understand what AI can mean for your organization
strategie.yes2: You want to involve the leadership team or a whole department
strategie.yes3: You're looking for a concrete roadmap with prioritized opportunities
strategie.no1: You already know what you want to automate
strategie.no2: You want to train individual employees
strategie.get4: Immediate starting point with quick wins
strategie.nextStepText: After the Strategy Session you know where the opportunities are. Next step is the Kickstart: first automation live in 4 weeks.
strategie.afterStat: 70% continue to Kickstart or Fundamentals. 30% start with the quick wins themselves.
strategie.get1detail: Ranked by impact and feasibility for your specific situation.
strategie.get2detail: Not 'AI can do a lot', but 'this saves you X hours per week.'
strategie.get3detail: Your team practices directly with AI tools. No slides, just results.
strategie.get4detail: Things you can already do differently tomorrow.
strategie.testimonialQuote: We thought we came to listen. We left with a plan.
strategie.processStep1detail: We map your context upfront: processes, tools, industry and challenges. The session is tailored to you.
strategie.processStep2detail: Interactive presentation: what can AI really do now? Relevant examples from your industry, not generic.
strategie.processStep3detail: Your team works with AI tools on their own use cases. No slides, direct results.
strategie.processStep4detail: Together we score 10-15 opportunities on impact and feasibility. You leave with a concrete action plan.

kickstart.metaDescription: First automation live in 4 weeks, roadmap for the rest, team of 10 trained. €10,000.
kickstart.title: Kickstart
kickstart.pitch: In 4 weeks: first automation live, roadmap for the rest, team of 10 trained. €5k upfront, €5k after roadmap approval. Stop after week 1 if it doesn't work.
kickstart.yes1: You want concrete proof that AI works for your organization
kickstart.yes2: You have processes that are time-consuming and manual
kickstart.yes3: You want fast results without months-long projects
kickstart.no1: You don't know where the opportunities are yet
kickstart.no2: You want to train the whole team first
kickstart.week1detail: Leadership kickoff, team training (10 people), domain expert interviews, use case mapping, infrastructure assessment.
kickstart.week1checkpoint: Friday week 1: Commitment checkpoint. First findings and baseline. Stop if it doesn't work, pay only €5k.
kickstart.week2detail: Complete infrastructure assessment, prioritized AI opportunities with ROI, start building selected use case.
kickstart.week34detail: Build and iterate on automation, feedback loops, documentation. Friday: final demo and roadmap sign-off.
kickstart.nextStepText: After the Kickstart you have proof and a roadmap. Next step is Adoption: 6 months of follow-through until your team can do it themselves.
kickstart.get1detail: Prioritized opportunities with ROI estimates. What is possible, what is missing, what is needed.
kickstart.get2detail: Live in your systems, with your data. 5-8 hours saved per week.
kickstart.get3detail: Half-day hands-on. Prompting, use cases, AI fundamentals.
kickstart.get4detail: Everything handed over. Clear advice for the next step.
kickstart.pricingRisk: Stop after week 1 if it doesn't work. Pay only €5k. Handshake, done.
kickstart.testimonialQuote: Our developers built in hours what normally takes weeks. Even the skeptics became enthusiastic. No theory, just building and deploying.
